text.title: Inference Cost Unit Economics Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the inference-cost-unit-economics methodology.

example.title: Support-agent unit economics Q2 2026
example.narrative: Cost per resolved ticket: $0.42 (LLM $0.31 + retrieval $0.06 + tools $0.05). Revenue per resolved ticket proxy: $4.10. Gross margin 90%. Retry-driven cost: 12% — flagged for retry-policy review.
example.artifact: unit-economics-report.md with cost tables + margin + flagged actions.
